description: Calendar year of the Karnataka Civil Registration System annual report.
Stable normalized geography identifier used in this public dataset.
District, city, or one-lakh-plus town/corporation name.
Geography level, such as district or city.
Stable normalized parent district identifier.
Parent district name for the geography.
Role in the local focus extract: primary city, primary district, surrounding district, or surrounding town.
Source area type: RURAL, URBAN, TOTAL, or ONE_LAKH_PLUS_TOWN.
Whether the source CRS table is place_of_occurrence or place_of_residence.
Male count for births or deaths, depending on file.
Female count for births or deaths, depending on file.
Total count for births or deaths, depending on file.
Birth or death rate when the source table provides one; blank otherwise.
Count within the reporting area for the relevant cross-area dimension.
Count outside the reporting area for the relevant cross-area dimension.
Count outside Karnataka/state when the source table provides it; blank otherwise.
Portable source identifier joining to source_manifest.csv.
Known extraction quality flag for the row; blank means no flag currently recorded.
OpenCity resource URL for the annual source PDF.
Original eJanMa / Government of Karnataka source domain recorded by the source package.
Extraction quality issue observed in the source-derived row.
